description_long: This is a round pepperoni pizza with a golden-brown crust and a slightly raised edge. The surface is covered with evenly spaced slices of pepperoni, each with a slightly glossy, oily appearance, and a light dusting of herbs and cheese. The crust appears to be thin and crisp, with a uniform thickness around the circumference. The cheese is melted and lightly browned, blending seamlessly with the tomato sauce beneath. The pizza is uncut, presenting a whole, unbroken surface. There is no visible packaging or branding present, and the pizza is displayed directly on a flat surface.
description: A whole, round pepperoni pizza with a golden-brown thin crust and evenly spaced pepperoni slices on a melted cheese surface.
description_view_0: The pizza is seen from a low angle, highlighting the thin, even crust and the distribution of pepperoni slices.
description_view_1: This view shows the pizza from a slightly rotated angle, maintaining the visibility of the toppings and the uniform crust.
description_view_2: The pizza is viewed from another side, with the pepperoni and cheese still clearly visible and the crust's thickness consistent.
description_view_3: This angle offers a similar perspective, emphasizing the round shape and the even spread of toppings across the surface.
